creator: zillion1@o2.pl
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #3)

I've just tested your suggestion on my current old system by stopping OpenVPN client, and manually adding alias to the lo0 interface.
Well, now my OpenVPN configuration is thinner (server only), everything just works like a charm! Just one alias... Huh!
Now I can build the world again =)

Thank you very much for your help and clarification.
Much appreciated.
Marek
